message:
fix(codegen): Handle union types and ArrayList iteration in float tests

Three fixes for float test compilation:

1. toPyValue union handling (packages/runtime/src/Objects/object.zig):
   - Add support for tagged unions (IntResult, PyPowResult, etc.)
   - Extract active field value and recursively convert to PyValue
   - Enables assertEqual(union_result, primitive) via assertEqualGeneric

2. Type inference for __floor__/__ceil__ (method_calls.zig):
   - Return .unknown instead of .int for float dunder methods
   - These methods return IntResult (union) at runtime, not i64
   - Forces assertEqual to use assertEqualGeneric path

3. ArrayList iteration in for loops (for_basic.zig):
   - Add comptime check for .items field on unknown-type variables
   - Handles cases where type inference != .list but codegen produces ArrayList
   - Pattern: if (@hasField(T, "items")) iter.items else iter
